how to reset college email password: To reset your college email password, go to the college IT portal and click on 'Forgot Password'.
where can i access course materials: You can access course materials on the student LMS portal under the 'Courses' section.
how to contact tech support: You can contact tech support at support@college.edu or visit the IT helpdesk in Block A.
what is the syllabus for ai-900: The AI-900 syllabus includes fundamentals of AI, machine learning, and Azure cognitive services.
